response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. Resume shows ~13-15 years post-degree with no demonstrated AI/ML products, no cloud platform strategy work, and no entrepreneurial leadership at scale. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling at re:cinq, which is far short of the principal-level AI strategy bar.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial initiative and long-term product ownership
Active community contributor with workshops, talks, and open-source libraries
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise required for an AI strategy principal role
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC, not director-level technical leadership advising strategic customers
Minimal cloud platform strategy depth; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is tactical, not architectural

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC bar
